title: A Body in the Bake-Off
description: The Lower Pibbleton Summer Fete has never had a fatality, and retired schoolmistress Tilly Marsh would dearly like to keep it that way — but the judge of the Victoria sponge category is found face-down in the marquee, and the vicar's alibi has crumbs on it. A gentle village whodunit with too much tea, a suspicious amount of jam, and one very determined amateur sleuth.
